message:
fix(packs/monitoring/splunk): close arg-as-subcommand bypass in safe patterns

splunk safe patterns (`list`, `show`, `search`) used `.*?\s+<sub>(?=\s|$)`
which let a positional arg literally named `list`/`show`/`search`
short-circuit destructive ops:

  splunk remove index list       -> matched splunk-list safe
  splunk clean eventdata show    -> matched splunk-show safe

Replaced `.*?` with flag-walker `(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*` on all 3
splunk safe subcommands.
